task_completion.description: Open the 'world_survey' project in the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application interface (QField) shows the 'world_survey' project loaded, visible in the title bar, menu, or project selection screen.
The 'cable_routes' layer is highlighted or selected in the layer panel, or the UI indicates that digitizing/editing is active for this layer.

task_completion.description: Digitize a polyline connecting Paris to Brussels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view shows a line being drawn or completed between the approximate geographic locations of Paris (France) and Brussels (Belgium).

task_completion.description: Set the Route Name attribute to 'PAR-BRU-F001'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The feature attribute form is open and the text 'PAR-BRU-F001' is entered into the Route Name field.

task_completion.description: Set the Cable Type attribute to 'fiber'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The feature attribute form shows 'fiber' entered or selected in the Cable Type field.

task_completion.description: Set the Notes attribute to 'Main trunk line segment 1'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The feature attribute form shows 'Main trunk line segment 1' entered into the Notes field.

task_completion.description: Save the newly digitized route and its attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user clicks the checkmark or save button on the attribute form, returning to the map view with the new polyline visible and no longer in active drawing mode.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QField app's menus, map canvas, and attribute forms, rather than using a terminal, script, or database editor to insert the data.

integrity.description: The agent manually digitized the route on the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: Crosshairs or digitizing tools are visible on the map canvas over the correct geographic regions, indicating manual drawing rather than programmatic injection.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard QField Android interface is visible throughout the trajectory, not a text editor or a mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires interacting with the QField app. The project 'world_survey' must be opened. The target layer is 'cable_routes'. The drawn polyline must connect Paris (~48.86 N, 2.35 E) and Brussels (~50.85 N, 4.35 E) with a tolerance of 2.0 degrees. The feature attributes must exactly match: route_name='PAR-BRU-F001', cable_type='fiber', notes='Main trunk line segment 1'.
